title: ProtocolLab Protocol Lane Normalization Verification
scope: Verify public lane, ordered-stack, shared-semantic, execution-profile, network-profile, validity, and availability declarations without verifying executable support.
verification_method: SpecTrace review, schema and fixture validation, catalog uniqueness checks, scenario and suite reference resolution, and repository-boundary inspection.
procedure: Confirm every activated scenario has one stable ID, one family, one primary protocol token, and an ordered protocol stack.
Confirm binding-specific scenarios declare requested and expected observed protocol identity and fallback rejection.
Confirm shared semanticTemplateId values do not erase lane-specific scenario identity.
Confirm execution and network profiles contain metadata only and name no required implementation or tool.
Confirm unsupported and unavailable behavior is explicit and catalog presence is not described as support evidence.
Validate Run Plan v2 snapshot identity, canonicalization, digest, and exact selection coverage.
Validate Test Executor Prepare v2 scenario and load-profile documents against their v2 schemas and canonical snapshot digests.
expected_result: All activated protocol-family contracts are uniquely identified, implementation-neutral, fail closed on binding mismatch, and explicit about unsupported or unavailable execution.
